settings.intro_text: Everything you need to know about processing times, delivery, tracking, and shipping updates for your Tailand order.
settings.card1_text: Orders are usually processed within 1–3 business days.
settings.card2_text: Tracking details are sent by email once your order ships.
settings.card3_text: Free shipping is available on orders over $60.
settings.card4_text: If your tracking has not updated, contact us and we'll help.
settings.cta_text: Send us your order number and we'll help you check your shipping status.

settings.title: Order Processing
settings.content: Orders are usually processed within 1–3 business days. Processing times may be slightly longer during holidays, sales, or high-volume periods.

settings.title: Shipping Times
settings.content: Estimated delivery times depend on your location and the shipping method available at checkout. You will receive tracking details once your order has shipped.

settings.title: Shipping Costs
settings.content: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout. Free shipping may be available when your order reaches the free shipping threshold.

settings.title: Tracking Your Order
settings.content: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link by email. You can use that link to view the latest delivery updates.

settings.title: Delayed Packages
settings.content: Tracking updates can sometimes take time to appear. If your tracking has not updated for several days, please contact us with your order number.

settings.title: Lost or Missing Packages
settings.content: If your package appears lost or has not arrived after the estimated delivery window, contact us and we'll help investigate.

settings.title: Wrong Shipping Address
settings.content: Please make sure your shipping address is correct before placing your order. If you notice a mistake, contact us as soon as possible.

settings.title: International Shipping
settings.content: Shipping availability may depend on your country and the products in your order. Any customs fees, import taxes, or local charges are the customer's responsibility where applicable.

settings.title: Contact Us
settings.content: If you have questions about shipping or tracking, contact us through our Contact Us page.

settings.question: When will my order ship?
settings.answer: Orders are usually processed within 1–3 business days. Once shipped, you'll receive a tracking email with your delivery details.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, we'll send a tracking link to your email. You can use that link to check the latest delivery updates at any time.

settings.question: Why is my tracking not updating?
settings.answer: Tracking updates can sometimes take a day or two to appear after shipping. If your tracking has not updated for several days, please contact us with your order number and we'll look into it.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! Free shipping is available on qualifying orders. The threshold and availability is shown at checkout.

settings.question: Can I change my shipping address?
settings.answer: If you need to update your shipping address, contact us as soon as possible after placing your order. We'll do our best to help before the order ships.

settings.question: What happens if my package is lost?
settings.answer: If your package has not arrived after the estimated delivery window, contact us with your order number. We'll help investigate and work to resolve the issue for you.
